# Pull Request Template

## Realm

Which realm(s) does this PR affect?

- [ ] 🏰 Asgard (Core Technology)
- [ ] 🤖 Vanaheim (AI Agents)
- [ ] ✨ Alfheim (UI Prototypes)
- [ ] 📚 Svartalfheim (Knowledge Base)
- [ ] 🔥 Muspelheim (Active Development)
- [ ] ❄️ Niflheim (Resources)
- [ ] 🌍 Midgard (Personal Apps)
- [ ] 🐉 Jotunheim (Massive Projects)
- [ ] 🌐 Cross-realm / Infrastructure

## Description

Brief description of what this PR does and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] 🚀 New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] 🔧 Configuration change (dependencies, CI, tooling)
- [ ] 🧹 Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] ✅ Test update / addition

## REGLAS Compliance

- [ ] This change follows the rules defined in `REGLAS_YGGDRASIL.md`
- [ ] The project remains in its correct realm (no unauthorized realm migrations)

## Testing

- [ ] I have added tests for my changes
- [ ] All existing tests pass
- [ ] I have tested this locally with `pytest`

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines (ruff linting passes)
- [ ] I have reviewed my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have checked for security implications (no hardcoded secrets, tokens, or .env values)

## Screenshots / Demo

(If applicable, add screenshots or asciinema recordings)
